Mo Compelling Responses To Interrogs
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Zhang's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $250 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
